### 2141130
**Care Bears: Unlock the Magic S01E21 - Three Cheers for Cheer**  
🆕 TV-Y7 🔓 11:01  
⌛ May 20, 2026 at 23:59:00 EDT  
[Open in app](https://cnvideo.sercomkc.org/redirector.html?type=cnapp&seriesid=10000000000&titleid=2141130&mediaid=64f75453459485933c5de8a3217b624414a685c3) or on the web: https://www.cartoonnetwork.com/video/care-bears-unlock-the-magic/three-cheers-for-cheer-episode.html  
seriesid=`2141109` titleid=`2141130` mediaid=`64f75453459485933c5de8a3217b624414a685c3`  
_When hard-working Cheer exhausts her crew running a string of drills to protect a Whiffle orchard from possible emergencies, Share's belly badge accidentally creates two Cheer duplicates. Cheer takes a recreation break, unaware that her clones are working Share and the crew - who think they're the real Cheer - even harder._  
<a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141130_001_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141130_001_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141130_002_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141130_002_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141130_003_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141130_003_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141130_004_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141130_004_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141130_005_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141130_005_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141130_006_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141130_006_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141130_007_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141130_007_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141130_008_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141130_008_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141130_009_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141130_009_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141130_010_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141130_010_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a>
